title: conyza longicaulis
intro: Conyza longicaulis, also known as horse mint or fleabane, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Conyza longicaulis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Conyza longicaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies.
